retrieved_result: Apache "Apache is a freely available Web server that is distributed under an \"open source\" license. Version 2.0 runs on most UNIX -based operating systems (such as Linux, Solaris, Digital UNIX, and AIX ), on other UNIX/ POSIX -derived systems (such as Rhapsody, Be OS, and BS2000/OSD), on Amiga OS, and on
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the Apache web server and its licensing/OS support, not IDEs or software development environments; thus it is not relevant to the query about top IDEs.
